---
description: Plan incremental development phases
---

You are in Stage II of the SDD workflow.

This repository uses a four-stage workflow (Stages I–IV). For feature work on completed projects, Stage IV follows the same planning pattern.

Create an incremental phase plan with:

- Phase name
- Purpose
- Dependencies
- Scope
- Validation
- Risks or tradeoffs

Keep the phases small and ordered so the work can be delivered safely.

Before finalizing the plan, point out anything that still needs confirmation.
